transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Helen Park. I'm calling because my ceiling fan is hot to the touch. Dispatcher: Hi Helen, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Leviton, maybe 10 years old. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 88 Maple Ave. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out next Monday at 9. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: ceiling fan is hot to the touch
expected_entities.equipment: Leviton ceiling fan, maybe 10 years old
